title: thelypteris copelandii
intro: Thelypteris copelandii, also known as the Copeland's fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used in various parts of the world, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris copelandii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating wounds, as well as its potential use as a natural remedy for various digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris copelandii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
